name: Phishing Patterns in ISO Archive
notes:
This is rule detects when an ISO file is opened with archive applications.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: Phishing Pattern ISO in Archive
SIGMA Description: Detects cases in which an ISO files is opend within an archiver like 7Zip or Winrar, which is a sign of phishing as threat actors put small ISO files in archives as email attachments to bypass certain filters and protective measures (mark of web)


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") IN ('isoburn.exe', 'poweriso.exe', 'imgburn.exe') AND LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") IN ('winrar.exe', '7zfm.exe', 'peazip.exe') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Phishing Patterns in ISO Archive on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") IN ('isoburn.exe', 'poweriso.exe', 'imgburn.exe') AND LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") IN ('winrar.exe', '7zfm.exe', 'peazip.exe') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Phishing Patterns in ISO Archive
Event description: Detects when an ISO file is opened with archive applications.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
